results.requirement_text: The system shall prevent users without administrator permission from opening the user management page.

test_cases.title: Verify that a user without administrator permission cannot open the user management page.
test_cases.objective: Prevent unauthorized access to user management page.
preconditions: Configured prerequisites for exercising this capability are available.

steps.action: Attempt to access the user management page as a user without administrator permission.
steps.expected_result: The user management page is not accessible.

test_cases.expected_result: The system prevents unauthorized access to the user management page.
assumptions: Assumption: The system has a permission system in place.

traceability.coverage_item: Verify that a user without administrator permission cannot open the user management page.

source_basis: prevent users without administrator permission from opening the user management page

test_cases.title: Verify that a user with administrator permission can open the user management page.
test_cases.objective: Allow authorized access to user management page.
preconditions: Configured prerequisites for exercising this capability are available.

steps.action: Attempt to access the user management page as a user with administrator permission.
steps.expected_result: The user management page is accessible.

test_cases.expected_result: The system allows authorized access to the user management page.
assumptions: Assumption: The system has a permission system in place.

traceability.coverage_item: Verify that a user with administrator permission can open the user management page.

source_basis: prevent users without administrator permission from opening the user management page
